message:
wip: Integrate WAMR AOT compiler, remove WasmEdge dependency

- Add aot_compiler.zig with WAMR C API for integrated AOT compilation
- Remove WasmEdge from edgeboxc (build tool is now WAMR-only)
- Update CI to build AOT compiler libs with SIMD support
- Inline arithmetic operations (add/sub/mul/div/mod/inc/dec/neg) for 6x speedup

BREAKING: edgeboxc is now build-only, use edgebox/edgeboxd for running

Work in progress - need to fix LLVM linking issues

files.patch:
@@ -40,31 +40,9 @@ jobs:
           wget https://github.com/sharkdp/hyperfine/releases/download/v1.20.0/hyperfine-musl_1.20.0_amd64.deb
           sudo dpkg -i hyperfine-musl_1.20.0_amd64.deb
 
-      - name: Install WasmEdge
-        run: |
-          curl -sSf https://raw.githubusercontent.com/WasmEdge/WasmEdge/master/utils/install.sh | bash -s -- -v 0.14.1
-          echo "$HOME/.wasmedge/bin" >> $GITHUB_PATH
-          echo "LD_LIBRARY_PATH=$HOME/.wasmedge/lib:$LD_LIBRARY_PATH" >> $GITHUB_ENV
-
-      - name: Build WAMR runtime library (Fast JIT - no SIMD)
-        run: |
-          cd vendor/wamr/product-mini/platforms/linux
-          mkdir -p build && cd build
-          cmake .. -DWAMR_BUILD_FAST_JIT=1 -DWAMR_BUILD_INTERP=1 -DWAMR_BUILD_AOT=1 -DWAMR_BUILD_LIBC_WASI=1 -DWAMR_BUILD_SIMD=0 -DWAMR_BUILD_INSTRUCTION_METERING=1 -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release
-          make -j$(nproc)
-
-      - name: Install LLVM for wamrc
+      - name: Install LLVM for WAMR AOT compiler
         run: sudo apt-get install -y llvm-18-dev
 
-      - name: Build wamrc AOT compiler (SIMD enabled - no Fast JIT)
-        run: |
-          cd vendor/wamr/wamr-compiler
-          mkdir -p build && cd build
-          cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DWAMR_BUILD_WITH_CUSTOM_LLVM=1 -DLLVM_DIR=/usr/lib/llvm-18/cmake -DWAMR_BUILD_SIMD=1
-          make -j$(nproc) wamrc
-          mkdir -p $GITHUB_WORKSPACE/zig-out/bin
-          cp wamrc $GITHUB_WORKSPACE/zig-out/bin/
-
       - name: Build CLI (benchmark subset)
         run: zig build bench -Doptimize=ReleaseFast
